handles: creating → derive iso_639_1 + iso_639_3 from code when not explicitly set
deleting → refuse when any WorkspaceLocale references this language (soft delete only via archive)
creating → consume 1 unit of localization.locales.count entitlement (throws QuotaExceeded when cap reached)
updating (is_default flipped) → set is_default=false on other rows for this workspace (invariant: exactly one default)
updating (is_fallback flipped) → same invariant for at most one fallback
deleting → refuse when is_default=true (must promote another locale first)
deleted → fire LanguageDisabledForWorkspace + optionally cascade delete workspace-specific Translation rows when ?purge=true
creating → refuse when quality_score < workspace_locale.min_quality_score (returns null; caller records failure)
created → invalidate in-memory LRU cache for (workspace_id, locale_code, namespace, key)
creating → refuse when workspace has an in-flight job for the same (kind, target_locale_codes) unless force flag
